   "source": [
    "# Lab 1: Interactive Image Processing Application\n",
    "\n",
    "In this lab, you will create an interactive image processing application using OpenCV, Matplotlib, and ipywidgets.\n",
    "\n",
    "### Objectives\n",
    "- Understand how to use OpenCV for image processing in Python.\n",
    "- Learn to use ipywidgets for creating interactive applications.\n",
    "- Familiarize with Matplotlib for displaying images and histograms.\n",
    "\n",
    "### Prerequisites\n",
    "- Basic knowledge of Python programming.\n",
    "- Familiarity with image processing concepts.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "df317ffa",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:38.857393Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:38.857079Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.694988Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.694153Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Import necessary libraries\n",
    "import cv2\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import ipywidgets as widgets\n",
    "from IPython.display import display\n",
    "import os\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ab3fbca4",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Setup\n",
    "Create an output directory to save processed images.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "2a072aec",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.697753Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.697226Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.700927Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.700281Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Define the path for the outputs directory\n",
    "output_path = './outputs/'\n",
    "# Use os.makedirs to create the directory if it doesn't exist\n",
    "os.makedirs(output_path, exist_ok=True)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "12d5661b",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Global Variables\n",
    "Initialize global variables to keep track of the images. These will be used across different callbacks.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "136b5309",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.702934Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.702511Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.705571Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.704885Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Global variables\n",
    "original_bgr = None\n",
    "original_rgb = None\n",
    "processed_rgb = None\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "35a92308",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Output Areas\n",
    "Create output areas for displaying messages, images, and histograms.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "818b5d40",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.707744Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.707179Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.713874Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.713511Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Create output widgets\n",
    "msg_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "img_out = widgets.Output()\n",
    "hist_out = widgets.Output()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "ff2670db",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Define Controls\n",
    "Define various controls needed for the interactive interface.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "6740ea20",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.716321Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.715708Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.729121Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.728752Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Create a button to browse images\n",
    "browse_btn = widgets.Button(description='Browse Image')\n",
    "# Create a button to convert images to grayscale\n",
    "grayscale_btn = widgets.Button(description='Convert to Grayscale')\n",
    "# Create a slider for brightness adjustment\n",
    "brightness_slider = widgets.IntSlider(description='Brightness', min=-100, max=100, value=0)\n",
    "# Create dropdowns for resizing and rotation\n",
    "resize_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(options=[('1.0', 1.0), ('0.75', 0.75), ('0.5', 0.5)], description='Resize')\n",
    "rotation_dropdown = widgets.Dropdown(options=[('0', 0), ('90', 90), ('180', 180), ('270', 270)], description='Rotate')\n",
    "# Create a button to plot histogram\n",
    "hist_btn = widgets.Button(description='Plot Histogram')\n",
    "# Create a button to save image\n",
    "save_btn = widgets.Button(description='Save Image')\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "cf5075d6",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Helper Functions\n",
    "Define functions to show images and histograms.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "7a6eb1c1",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.733028Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.732701Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.737531Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.736828Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with img_out:\n",
    "        img_out.clear_output(wait=True)\n",
    "        fig, ax = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(10, 5))\n",
    "        ax[0].imshow(original_rgb)\n",
    "        ax[0].set_title('Original Image')\n",
    "        ax[0].axis('off')\n",
    "        ax[1].imshow(processed_rgb)\n",
    "        ax[1].set_title('Processed Image')\n",
    "        ax[1].axis('off')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n",
    "\n",
    "def show_histogram(processed_rgb):\n",
    "    with hist_out:\n",
    "        hist_out.clear_output(wait=True)\n",
    "        gray = cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "        plt.figure(figsize=(5, 3))\n",
    "        plt.hist(gray.ravel(), bins=256, range=(0, 256), color='black')\n",
    "        plt.title('Histogram')\n",
    "        plt.show()\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "633e4531",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Callback Functions\n",
    "Implement callback functions for each control.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "7c2f5159",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.739972Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.739338Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.747727Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.746993Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "def on_browse_image_click(b):\n",
    "    from IPython.display import clear_output\n",
    "    from ipywidgets import FileUpload\n",
    "    uploader = FileUpload(accept='.png, .jpg, .jpeg', multiple=False)\n",
    "    display(uploader)\n",
    "    def on_upload_change(change):\n",
    "        global original_bgr, original_rgb, processed_rgb\n",
    "        if uploader.value:\n",
    "            for name, file_info in uploader.value.items():\n",
    "                content = file_info['content']\n",
    "                with open(name, 'wb') as f:\n",
    "                    f.write(content)\n",
    "                original_bgr = cv2.imread(name)\n",
    "                original_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(original_bgr, cv2.COLOR_BGR2RGB)\n",
    "                processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "                show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "                with msg_out:\n",
    "                    msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "                    print(f'Loaded image: {name}')\n",
    "        clear_output()\n",
    "    uploader.observe(on_upload_change, names='value')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_grayscale_click(b):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    gray = cv2.cvtColor(original_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2GRAY)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.cvtColor(gray, cv2.COLOR_GRAY2RGB)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_brightness_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    brightness_value = change['new']\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.convertScaleAbs(original_rgb, alpha=1, beta=brightness_value)\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_resize_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    scale = change['new']\n",
    "    width = int(original_rgb.shape[1] * scale)\n",
    "    height = int(original_rgb.shape[0] * scale)\n",
    "    processed_rgb = cv2.resize(original_rgb, (width, height))\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Resized to: {processed_rgb.shape[1]}x{processed_rgb.shape[0]}')\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_rotation_change(change):\n",
    "    global processed_rgb\n",
    "    angle = change['new']\n",
    "    if angle == 90:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, cv2.ROTATE_90_CLOCKWISE)\n",
    "    elif angle == 180:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, cv2.ROTATE_180)\n",
    "    elif angle == 270:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = cv2.rotate(original_rgb, cv2.ROTATE_90_COUNTERCLOCKWISE)\n",
    "    else:\n",
    "        processed_rgb = original_rgb.copy()\n",
    "    show_images(original_rgb, processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_plot_histogram_click(b):\n",
    "    show_histogram(processed_rgb)\n",
    "\n",
    "def on_save_image_click(b):\n",
    "    output_filename = os.path.join(output_path, 'processed_image.png')\n",
    "    cv2.imwrite(output_filename, cv2.cvtColor(processed_rgb, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR))\n",
    "    with msg_out:\n",
    "        msg_out.clear_output()\n",
    "        print(f'Saved image to: {output_filename}')\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3b26d86e",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Connect Callbacks\n",
    "Connect the defined functions to widgets as callbacks.\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "aee9ad84",
   "metadata": {
    "execution": {
     "iopub.execute_input": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.749998Z",
     "iopub.status.busy": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.749787Z",
     "iopub.status.idle": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.753103Z",
     "shell.execute_reply": "2026-02-28T15:22:39.752548Z"
    }
   },
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Connect the buttons to their callbacks\n",
    "browse_btn.on_click(on_browse_image_click)\n",
    "grayscale_btn.on_click(on_grayscale_click)\n",
    "brightness_slider.observe(on_brightness_change, names='value')\n",
    "resize_dropdown.observe(on_resize_change, names='value')\n",
    "rotation_dropdown.observe(on_rotation_change, names='value')\n",
    "hist_btn.on_click(on_plot_histogram_click)\n",
    "save_btn.on_click(on_save_image_click)\n"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "8986c561",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [

   "source": [
    "# Display the layout\n",
    "controls = widgets.VBox([browse_btn, grayscale_btn, brightness_slider, resize_dropdown, rotation_dropdown, hist_btn, save_btn])\n",
    "right_side = widgets.VBox([img_out, hist_out])\n",
    "ui = widgets.HBox([controls, right_side])\n",
    "display(msg_out, ui)\n",
    "with msg_out:\n",
    "    print('Please click Browse Image to start.')\n"
   ]
  }
